name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: PLS Check Cashers Phoenix, AZ — PLS Check Cashers is a multi-state financial services provider offering check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, and go...
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers operates as a financial services retailer across 12 states (Arizona, California, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Massachusetts, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wisconsin). The company has evolved beyond traditional check cashing to become a comprehensive service hub combining financial and transportation services under one roof.

The company's core financial offerings include check cashing, money orders, bill payment, Ria Money Transfer, government benefits access, and foreign exchange services. They also issue the Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard with a mobile app component. Additionally, PLS provides ATM access, notary services, fax and copy services, phone top-ups, and cash and coin services. A significant expansion into state-mandated services includes driver's license testing and issuance (as an authorized ADOT third-party provider in Arizona), vehicle registration, title transfers, license plate services, and bus passes.

PLS distinguishes itself by combining traditional check-cashing services with government-authorized transportation services, allowing consumers to handle both financial transactions and vehicle/licensing needs at a single location. The Phoenix Central Avenue location specifically offers bilingual staff and extended hours, with the general store open most days until 9 PM and some services available 24/7. The company has also made recent updates to its privacy policy to clarify data collection and usage practices.

The service breadth is genuinely useful for underbanked populations, though the company operates as a for-profit financial services provider rather than a non-profit alternative. Consumers should review specific fee structures for check cashing and money transfer services, which are not disclosed on the website. The expansion into driver's license and vehicle services, while convenient, should not obscure that PLS remains fundamentally a fee-based financial services business.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Operates as authorized ADOT third-party provider, eliminating separate trips to DMV for Arizona driver's license and vehicle services
Bilingual staff available at Phoenix location, improving accessibility for Spanish-speaking customers
Extended hours (7 AM–9 PM weekdays, weekend service) with some services available 24/7
One-stop shop combining financial services, government services, and transportation needs at single location
On-site photo and document services for driver's license applications with temporary paper license issued same-day
Multiple money transfer options including Ria Money Transfer and foreign exchange services
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard with mobile app, providing banking alternative for unbanked/underbanked consumers
cons: Check cashing and money transfer fee structures not disclosed on website; consumers cannot compare costs beforehand
Driver's license and vehicle services only confirmed available at one Phoenix location despite multi-state presence
No information provided about alternative identification requirements, credit checks, or eligibility restrictions for services
Recent privacy policy update indicates data collection and sharing practices that should be reviewed carefully before use
As for-profit financial services provider, lacks transparency typical of non-profit credit counseling or CDFI alternatives
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing check cashing, bill pay, and money transfer services without traditional bank accounts
Arizona residents requiring driver's license, vehicle registration, or license plate services who prefer private third-party provider over DMV
Spanish-speaking consumers in Phoenix seeking bilingual financial and government services at single location
Consumers wanting debit card access and mobile banking tools without credit requirements or bank account prerequisites
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers seeking convenient financial services and, in Arizona, government-authorized vehicle/licensing services without navigating traditional banks or government agencies. The main caveat is that specific fee structures for check cashing and money transfers are not disclosed online, requiring in-person inquiry, and driver's license services appear limited to the Phoenix Central Avenue location despite multi-state operations.
services: Driver's license issuance and renewal (Arizona, ADOT-authorized)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 5808 S Central Ave Ste 101, Phoenix, AZ 85040
